rule_metadata.name: fake_sms
rule_metadata.description: Detection patterns for the tool 'fake-sms' taken from the ThreatHunting-Keywords github project
rule_metadata.author: @mthcht

rules.rule_text:
rule fake_sms
{
	meta:
		description = "Detection patterns for the tool 'fake-sms' taken from the ThreatHunting-Keywords github project"
		author = "@mthcht"
		reference = "https://github.com/mthcht/ThreatHunting-Keywords"
		tool = "fake-sms"
		rule_category = "offensive_tool_keyword"

	strings:
		$string1 = /\.\/fake\-sms/
		$string2 = "/bin/fake-sms"
		$string3 = /\/fake\-sms\.git/ nocase ascii wide
		$string4 = "fake-sms-main" nocase ascii wide
		$string5 = "Narasimha1997/fake-sms" nocase ascii wide

	condition:
		any of them
}
